<!-- source-snippet repo="scribe" path="docs/user/component-howtos/pqs/references/sql-api.rst" commit="9066c81716d62cbb879e677d5bec96bb5324891f" snippet="scribe-rst-code-docs-user-component-howtos-pqs-references-sql-api-sql-244" location="lines:244-248" -->
```sql
   select c.contract_id, t.transaction_id, (t.trace_context).trace_parent
   from creates('package:My.Module:Template') c
   inner join transactions t on c.created_at_ix = t.ix
   where c.create_event_id = (42::bigint,0);

```
